aids.title: NIPOU-DICE = 10 Challenges
aids.content: **N**on-representative data, **I**nsufficient data, **P**oor quality, **O**verfitting, **U**nderfitting, **D**imensionality curse, **I**rrelevant features, **C**omputational cost, **E**thics & interpretability

aids.title: The Clothing Analogy
aids.content: **Overfitting** = clothes so tight they only fit one person (training data). **Underfitting** = clothes so loose they fit nobody well. **Good fit** = tailored to fit most people (generalizes).

aids.title: Spotting Overfitting vs. Underfitting
aids.content: Overfitting: train accuracy HIGH, test accuracy LOW. Underfitting: BOTH accuracies LOW. The gap between train and test error tells you which problem you have.
